title: glossocardia bidens
intro: Glossocardia bidens, also known as the Bidens plant or Devil's Gowan, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Glossocardia bidens include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating various gastrointestinal issues such as diarrhea and dysentery. Glossocardia bidens can be prepared as an infusion or tincture, and it is also used in herbal teas and decoctions to leverage its medicinal properties.
